name: Apricot Lite Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups (360 mL) crushed, unsweetened pineapple (canned, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the dried apricots with cold water and let soak overnight.
2. Simmer the apricots in the soaking water, uncovered, until tender.
3. Mash the apricots using a potato masher or food processor.
4. Add the crushed pineapple, orange, lemon juice, and sugar to the apricot mixture.
5. Simmer until the sugar has dissolved, stirring frequently; then cook over high heat until thick, about 20 - 30 minutes.
6. Skim off any foam that forms during cooking.
7. Pour into hot jars, leaving a 1/4-inch (6 mm) head space.
8. Adjust lids and process for 10 minutes in boiling water bath.
Yield: 6 half pints (1440 mL)
